scripts.qa: bun run lint && bun run fmt:check && turbo -F web check && turbo test
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply blog-db --local --config apps/api/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply blog-db-staging --remote --env staging --config apps/api/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply blog-db --remote --config apps/api/wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:web:staging: PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://staging.hmziqblog.pages.dev CONTENT_DIR=$(bun run media:rewrite) turbo -F web build:staging && wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name=hmziqblog --branch=staging
scripts.deploy:web:prod: PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://blog.hmziq.rs CONTENT_DIR=$(bun run media:rewrite) turbo -F web build:prod && wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name=hmziqblog --branch=master
scripts.deploy:staging: bun run db:migrate:staging && bun run media:upload && bun run deploy:api:staging && bun run deploy:web:staging
scripts.deploy:staging:nomedia: bun run db:migrate:staging && bun run deploy:api:staging && bun run deploy:web:staging
scripts.deploy:prod: bun run db:migrate:prod && bun run media:upload && bun run deploy:api:prod && bun run deploy:web:prod
scripts.deploy:prod:nomedia: bun run db:migrate:prod && bun run deploy:api:prod && bun run deploy:web:prod
